title: FOTW Session — discovery_call — FOTW-4baa3133
body:
[host] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): Tell me about your current content process.

[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): We're struggling with consistency. Nothing works.

[host] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): What have you tried that came closest to working?

[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): We tried scheduling tools but they don't create the content.

[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): How much would a full production service cost?
